response.overview: Arunava Bagchi, a young government officer and passionate theatre actor from Balurghat, joins hands with veteran director Chandramadhab Shil to revive the town's once-renowned theatre group by adapting Sarat Chandra Chattopadhyay's Mahesh. When the production evolves into Balurghat's first-ever feature film, Chandramadhab's insistence on casting a real bull in the tit...
response.title: Phutaniganjer Mahesh
